requirement_topic.en: CE Marking and TSE Type-Examination — Mandatory Conformity for Heat Pumps
requirement_topic.zh: CE标志与TSE型式检验——热泵强制符合性
requirement_topic.zht: CE標誌與TSE型式檢驗——熱泵強制符合性

summary.en: Turkey has adopted EU directives via Presidential Decrees (equivalent to EU Regulations and Directives in effect). CE marking is mandatory for heat pump equipment placed on the Turkish market. Applicable directives include the Low Voltage Directive (LVD, 2014/35/EU equivalent), Electromagnetic Compatibility Directive (EMC, 2014/30/EU equivalent), and Machinery Directive (2006/42/EC equivalent) where applicable. Conformity assessment may be performed by TÜRKAK-accredited bodies or EU-recognised Notified Bodies whose assessments Turkey accepts. A Declaration of Conformity (DoC) in Turkish must accompany the product; Turkish-language labelling and user documentation are required. For products not CE-marked, TSE type-examination via the Turkish Standards Institution provides an alternative compliance route.
summary.zh: 土耳其已通过总统令采用欧盟指令（相当于现行欧盟法规和指令）。CE标志对在土耳其市场投放的热泵设备为强制要求。适用指令包括低电压指令（LVD，相当于2014/35/EU）、电磁兼容指令（EMC，相当于2014/30/EU）及适用时的机械指令（相当于2006/42/EC）。符合性评定可由TÜRKAK认可机构或土耳其认可的欧盟公告机构执行。产品须附有土耳其语符合性声明（DoC）；需提供土耳其语标签和用户文件。对于未取得CE标志的产品，通过土耳其标准协会（TSE）进行型式检验提供替代合规路径。
summary.zht: 土耳其已通過總統令採用歐盟指令（相當於現行歐盟法規和指令）。CE標誌對在土耳其市場投放的熱泵設備為強制要求。適用指令包括低電壓指令（LVD，相當於2014/35/EU）、電磁相容指令（EMC，相當於2014/30/EU）及適用時的機械指令（相當於2006/42/EC）。符合性評定可由TÜRKAK認可機構或土耳其認可的歐盟公告機構執行。產品須附有土耳其語符合性聲明（DoC）；需提供土耳其語標籤和用戶文件。對於未取得CE標誌的產品，通過土耳其標準協會（TSE）進行型式檢驗提供替代合規路徑。

standards_or_laws: Turkey Presidential Decree adopting LVD (2014/35/EU equivalent)
Turkey Presidential Decree adopting EMC Directive (2014/30/EU equivalent)
Turkey Presidential Decree adopting Machinery Directive (2006/42/EC equivalent)

summary.en: Chinese heat pumps up to 40 kW require CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under GB 4706 / GB 25454, with testing to GB/T 7725 and GB 9237. CCC is issued by CNCA-designated bodies. The CCC mark, Chinese DoC, and Chinese-language documentation are prepared for the China domestic market. None of these are recognised by Turkey or count as CE marking evidence.
summary.zh: 中国40kW以下热泵须按GB 4706 / GB 25454取得CCC（中国强制性产品认证），按GB/T 7725和GB 9237进行测试。CCC由CNCA指定机构颁发。CCC标志、中国符合性声明和中文文件面向中国内销市场准备，土耳其均不予认可，也不能作为CE标志证据。
summary.zht: 中國40kW以下熱泵須按GB 4706 / GB 25454取得CCC（中國強制性產品認證），按GB/T 7725和GB 9237進行測試。CCC由CNCA指定機構頒發。CCC標誌、中國符合性聲明和中文文件面向中國內銷市場準備，土耳其均不予認可，也不能作為CE標誌證據。

gap.en: CCC is not recognised in Turkey and does not substitute for CE marking. Exporters must obtain CE marking under the applicable Turkish-adopted EU directives, with conformity assessment by a TÜRKAK-accredited or accepted Notified Body, and prepare a Turkish-language DoC and product labelling. Existing Chinese test reports may be partially reusable if the testing laboratory is TÜRKAK-recognised, but scope alignment to EN / IEC standards referenced by the directives must be confirmed.
gap.zh: CCC在土耳其不被认可，不能替代CE标志。出口商须根据土耳其采用的相关欧盟指令取得CE标志，由TÜRKAK认可或接受的公告机构进行符合性评定，并准备土耳其语符合性声明和产品标签。若检测实验室获得TÜRKAK认可，现有中国检测报告或可部分复用，但须确认与指令所引EN / IEC标准的范围对齐。
gap.zht: CCC在土耳其不被認可，不能替代CE標誌。出口商須根據土耳其採用的相關歐盟指令取得CE標誌，由TÜRKAK認可或接受的公告機構進行符合性評定，並準備土耳其語符合性聲明和產品標籤。若檢測實驗室獲得TÜRKAK認可，現有中國檢測報告或可部分複用，但須確認與指令所引EN / IEC標準的範圍對齊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking required for Turkish market placement; TSE route available as alternative
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory for China domestic market; not valid for Turkey

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — CE marking under Turkish-adopted EU directives is mandatory; CCC is not recognised. A full CE conformity assessment, Turkish DoC, and Turkish-language documentation package must be established before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——依据土耳其采用的欧盟指令，CE标志为强制要求；CCC不被认可。进入市场前须完成完整CE符合性评定、土耳其语符合性声明及土耳其语文件包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——依據土耳其採用的歐盟指令，CE標誌為強制要求；CCC不被認可。進入市場前須完成完整CE符合性評定、土耳其語符合性聲明及土耳其語文件包。
